items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Bangicode primary button — sentence case label, 4px radius, navy fill. Built from shadcn/Radix Slot + class-variance-authority.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text input — surface fill, outline-variant border, 4px radius, Hanken Grotesk body-sm.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Accessible form label via Radix UI Label primitive, Hanken Grotesk text-sm.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multi-line text input — surface fill, outline-variant border, 4px radius, resizable.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Accessible select dropdown via Radix UI Select, surface fill, JetBrains Mono group labels.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Accessible checkbox via Radix UI Checkbox, 4px radius, Navy fill on checked.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio group
items.description: Accessible radio group via Radix UI RadioGroup, 4px radius, Navy fill on selected.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Toggle switch via Radix UI Switch, 4px radius thumb, Navy fill when on.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: React Hook Form + Zod wrapper with accessible FormField, FormLabel, FormMessage primitives.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog via Radix UI Dialog — surface-container-high bg, 8px radius, scrim overlay.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown menu
items.description: Accessible dropdown menu via Radix UI DropdownMenu — 4px radius, JetBrains Mono labels.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Floating popover via Radix UI Popover — surface-container-high bg, 4px radius, no shadow.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Slide-in panel via Radix UI Dialog — 4 sides (top/bottom/left/right), scrim overlay.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tab navigation via Radix UI Tabs — Sky Blue 4px active indicator, no shadow.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Disclosure accordion via Radix UI Accordion — outline-variant dividers, no card shadow.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Inline status alert — default, info, success, destructive variants. No shadow, border-only depth.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Toast (Sonner)
items.description: Toast notifications via Sonner — top-right, JetBrains Mono optional label, Bangicode themed.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Accessible tooltip via Radix UI Tooltip — surface-container-high bg, 4px radius, body-sm.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Status tag — JetBrains Mono, uppercase, 4px radius. Variants: default, primary, secondary, outline, destructive.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Container card — outline-variant border, surface background, 8px radius, 24px padding.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Horizontal or vertical 1px divider — outline-variant color via Radix UI Separator.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: User avatar via Radix UI Avatar — 4px radius (not circular), Hanken Grotesk initials fallback.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading skeleton — muted background pulse animation, 4px radius, no shadow.

items.name: sidebar-nav
items.title: Sidebar navigation
items.description: Fixed 280px sidebar — primary-container Navy bg, Sky Blue 4px active indicator, mobile Sheet variant.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data table
items.description: TanStack Table v8 wrapper — Montserrat headers, JetBrains Mono numeric cells, surface-container row hover, no striping.

items.name: charts
items.title: Charts (Recharts)
items.description: Line, Bar, Area, Pie wrappers — token-mapped Navy/Sky palette, outline-variant grid, JetBrains Mono tooltip.

items.name: stats-card
items.title: Stats card
items.description: Number-forward metric card — Montserrat display number, JetBrains Mono label, delta indicator.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Navigation breadcrumb — Hanken Grotesk body-sm, muted for inactive, foreground for current.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page navigation — ghost button style, JetBrains Mono page numbers, 4px radius.

items.name: hero-section
items.title: Hero section
items.description: Top-of-page marketing hero — Montserrat display-lg headline, Hanken Grotesk copy, CTA pair, optional JetBrains Mono eyebrow.

items.name: feature-grid
items.title: Feature grid
items.description: 3-up / 4-up feature showcase — Lucide icon Sky Blue, headline-sm title, body-md description. Optional card chrome.

items.name: pricing-table
items.title: Pricing table
items.description: Side-by-side pricing tiers — featured tier with surface-container-high + Sky Blue left border, Montserrat price, Check icons.

items.name: cta-block
items.title: CTA block
items.description: Full-width band — primary-container Navy bg, white display-md headline, single CTA button.

items.name: testimonials
items.title: Testimonials
items.description: Quote-led testimonial grid — card chrome, Hanken Grotesk quote, Avatar + JetBrains Mono role/company.

items.name: logo-cloud
items.title: Logo cloud
items.description: Grayscale customer logo row — on-surface-variant tint, 5–6 per row, optional JetBrains Mono eyebrow.

items.name: faq-section
items.title: FAQ section
items.description: Accordion-based FAQ — stacked or split layout (heading left, answers right).

items.name: site-footer
items.title: Site footer
items.description: 3–4 column link grid + wordmark + copyright — JetBrains Mono column headings and legal line.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Radix Collapsible primitive — used by sidebar submenus and disclosure patterns.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Form field primitives — Field, FieldGroup, FieldLabel, FieldDescription, FieldError, FieldSeparator with vertical/horizontal/responsive orientations.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Full-featured collapsible sidebar — icon mode (sidebar-07), submenu mode (sidebar-03), offcanvas mobile. Ctrl+B keyboard shortcut, cookie-persisted state.

items.name: login-form
items.title: Login form
items.description: Card-based sign-in form with email + password fields, forgot-password link, and OAuth button slot.

items.name: login-form-split
items.title: Login form (split)
items.description: Split-panel sign-in — form on the left, full-bleed image on the right. Includes Apple/Google/Meta OAuth buttons.

items.name: signup-form
items.title: Signup form
items.description: Card-based account creation form — full name, email, password + confirm password, Google OAuth.
